metadata.title: Systematic Literature Review - Consensus Research for Vitalora
metadata.description: Evidence-based research compilation for 5 key metabolic diseases (2015-2026)

papers.title: Atherogenic Lipid Indices in Colorectal Cancer: Metabolic Associations and Survival Outcomes
papers.main_contribution: Evaluates atherogenic indices (AIP, AC, RC) as prognostic biomarkers in CRC patients with T2DM; limited prognostic utility beyond oncologic factors
papers.research_gap: Need for integrated lipid profiling in CRC risk stratification; mechanisms linking dyslipidemia to cancer outcomes

papers.title: Therapeutic effects and mechanisms of Huangqi Chifeng Decoction on hyperlipidemia in rats: an integrated metabolomics approach
papers.journal: China Journal of Chinese Materia Medica
papers.main_contribution: Metabolomics-confirmed lipid-lowering mechanism of herbal formula; involvement of TCA cycle, fructose/mannose metabolism
papers.research_gap: Limited clinical trials on traditional herbal treatments; need for RCT validation in humans

papers.title: Clinical characteristics and risk factors of dyslipidemia in patients with rheumatoid arthritis
papers.main_contribution: Integrated predictive model combining clinical + inflammatory markers improves dyslipidemia discrimination in RA; TC, TG, LDL-C correlate with disease activity
papers.research_gap: Need for prospective validation; understanding disease-specific lipid abnormality mechanisms

papers.title: Attainment of non-high-density lipoprotein cholesterol targets in secondary and primary care: A secondary-analysis of the DA VINCI study
papers.main_contribution: Only 59% of patients achieve non-HDL-C goals; stricter 2019 guidelines show 40% goal-attainment; residual risk in TG-rich lipoprotein subclass
papers.research_gap: Intensive combination lipid-lowering therapy underutilized; need for risk-stratified treatment protocols

papers.title: Evaluation of Urine Exosome Lecithin Cholesterol Acyltransferase as a Biomarker for Diabetes Diagnosis and Dyslipidemia
papers.main_contribution: Urine exosome LCAT serves as novel biomarker for diabetes; shows dynamic changes (early rise, then decline with poor control)
papers.research_gap: Validation in larger cohorts; mechanistic links between LCAT dysregulation and metabolic disease progression

papers.title: Preliminary Evidence for the Association of APOB rs1042034 With Short-Term Statin-Induced Lipid Lowering: An Exploratory Study in Vietnam
papers.main_contribution: APOB rs1042034 TT genotype shows reduced statin response; pharmacogenomic variant influences lipid-lowering efficacy
papers.research_gap: Need for pharmacogenomic screening in hypercholesterolemia management; ethnic-specific cutoff validation

papers.title: Metrnl as a predictive biomarker for postprandial hypertriglyceridemia in overweight and obese populations
papers.main_contribution: Combined Metrnl + fasting TG model achieves AUC 0.908 for PHTG prediction; Metrnl protective cutoff 2.11 ng/ml
papers.research_gap: Mechanistic studies on Metrnl signaling; integration with other adipokines for refined risk prediction

papers.title: Secondary prevention and management of dyslipidaemia in patients with coronary artery disease on statin therapy in a tertiary academic centre in Johannesburg
papers.main_contribution: Only 20.3% of ASCVD patients achieve LDL-C <1.4 mmol/L; prior CAD/stroke increases poor control risk
papers.research_gap: Barriers to LDL-C goal attainment in African populations; implementation strategies for guideline adherence

papers.title: Fats and Facts: A Meta-Analysis of Lipid Biomarkers in Endometrial Cancer
papers.main_contribution: Meta-analysis of 6 studies: elevated TG (SMD +0.87), reduced HDL-C (SMD -0.92), elevated LDL-C (SMD +0.74) in EC patients
papers.research_gap: Causality mechanisms in cancer pathogenesis; need for prospective cohort studies; integration into cancer screening algorithms

papers.title: Association Between Preoperative Dyslipidemia and the Prognosis of Patients With Endometrial Cancer: A Retrospective Cohort Study
papers.journal: The Kaohsiung Journal of Medical Sciences
papers.main_contribution: High TG (≥1.7 mmol/L) and low HDL-C (<1.0 mmol/L) independently predict OS in EC patients; median survival 81.6 vs 91.2 months
papers.research_gap: Lipid profiling not routinely integrated in EC prognostic assessment; need for standardized cutoff validation

papers.title: Assessment of subclinical myocardial dysfunction and osteogenic biomarkers in normoglycemic individuals with familial predisposition to type 2 diabetes mellitus
papers.main_contribution: LV-STE detects early myocardial impairment in normoglycemic T2DM relatives; reduced osteocalcin levels; osteogenic biomarkers may enhance risk stratification
papers.research_gap: Longitudinal prognostic value of osteogenic markers in T2DM progression unclear; need for prospective follow-up

papers.title: Is there still room for pioglitazone in contemporary type 2 diabetes management?
papers.main_contribution: GLP-1RA shows lower heart failure risk than pioglitazone; both agents have cardiometabolic benefits; individualized therapy selection needed
papers.research_gap: Real-world comparative efficacy data limited; cost-effectiveness in resource-limited settings not well studied

papers.title: Intervening Early in the Cardiovascular-Kidney-Metabolic Syndrome: Expert Recommendations from the United Arab Emirates on the Management of Prediabetes
papers.main_contribution: Prediabetes represents reversible early CKM syndrome; metformin + lifestyle intervention effective; weight loss with incretin agonists prevents diabetes
papers.research_gap: Long-term maintenance strategies after pharmacotherapy withdrawal; ethnic-specific effectiveness data needed

papers.title: MIR-29A, MIR-222 AND MIR-132 IN THE BLOOD PLASMA OF PREGNANT WOMEN AS PREDICTORS OF GESTATIONAL DIABETES
papers.main_contribution: miR-29a, miR-222, miR-132 show variable expression in hyperglycemic pregnant women; potential biomarkers for GDM risk assessment
papers.research_gap: Limited validation in larger cohorts; need for longitudinal follow-up studies to confirm predictive value

papers.title: The predictive potential of surrogate indicators of insulin resistance for type 2 diabetic kidney disease
papers.main_contribution: TyG, TyG-BMI, TG/HDL-C show AUC >0.7 for DKD prediction; gender interaction identified for TG/HDL-C; nonlinear dose-response relationships
papers.research_gap: Mechanistic studies on IR markers and kidney injury; validation in diverse populations (age, ethnicity, BMI strata)

papers.title: A meta-analysis of serum uric acid and diabetic nephropathy risk in type 2 diabetes
papers.main_contribution: Elevated SUA significantly increases DKD risk (OR 1.85); moderate heterogeneity; eGFR lower in hyperuricemia group; urate-lowering interventions warrant investigation
papers.research_gap: Causality vs. confounding; RCT evidence for urate-lowering therapy in T2DM-DKD insufficient

papers.title: A Study of the Relationship Between Serum Albumin-Corrected Fructosamine and Type 2 Diabetic Retinopathy
papers.main_contribution: Elevated AlbF independently associated with DR (adjusted OR 1.88 per 10 μmol/g); dose-response relationship evident; potential screening biomarker
papers.research_gap: Mechanism of AlbF-retinal injury link unclear; prospective validation needed

papers.title: The epidemiology of metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease among pediatric patients with type 2 diabetes: Systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.main_contribution: MASLD affects 36.61% of pediatric T2DM (95% CI 26.45-48.12); prevalence varies by diagnostic method; MR-based highest (55%); early screening critical
papers.research_gap: Noninvasive test validation in pediatrics; therapeutic intervention trials lacking

papers.title: Sex-specific associations of lipid profiles with type 2 diabetes: Insights from the Shiraz University employees cohort
papers.main_contribution: TG/HDL-C ratio sex-specific predictor (men OR 1.28, women OR 1.35); optimal cutoffs differ by sex (3.72 vs 2.73); simple, accessible biomarker
papers.research_gap: Clinical implementation of sex-stratified cutoffs; prospective validation in diverse populations

papers.title: Associations between methylglyoxal and cerebral small vessel disease and cognitive function - The Maastricht Study
papers.journal: Journal of Stroke and Cerebrovascular Diseases
papers.main_contribution: Intermediate plasma MGO associated with lacunar infarcts (OR 2.26); no linear associations; diabetes as major CSVD risk factor; AGE pathways implicated
papers.research_gap: Causality of MGO in microvascular disease; intervention trials targeting AGE formation in diabetes

papers.title: Interplay of childhood metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease and obesity in the development of youth-onset type 2 diabetes
papers.main_contribution: MASLD affects ~13% children globally, 47% with obesity; 2.7-fold increased T2D risk; ceramides & pro-inflammatory cytokines key mechanisms; GLP-1RA show promise
papers.research_gap: Noninvasive biomarker validation in pediatrics; equitable access to targeted therapies; socioeconomic disparities

papers.title: A Simple Screening Strategy for Metabolic Dysfunction-Associated Steatotic Liver Disease in General Health Checkups
papers.main_contribution: Novel 6-variable scoring system (age, BMI, HDL-C, HbA1c, ALT, albumin) achieves higher AUC than FLI, HSI, NAFLD ridge; useful for health screening centers
papers.research_gap: Prospective validation; implementation in primary care settings; cost-effectiveness analysis

papers.title: Lipid-related Insulin Resistance Indices for the Diagnosis of Non-alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease in Chinese Adults
papers.main_contribution: TyG-BMI optimal in NAFLD with metabolic abnormalities (AUC 0.819, cutoff 39.77); TyG index better for NAFLD without MA (AUC 0.724, cutoff 1.580)
papers.research_gap: Validation in diverse ethnic groups; standardization of cutoff values; prospective DKD/NASH risk prediction

papers.title: Association of Life's Simple 7 with metabolic-associated steatotic liver disease and non-invasive fibrosis markers
papers.main_contribution: LS7 score inversely associated with MASLD (RR 0.80); 82% MASLD in poor LS7, 47% intermediate, 16% ideal; weak fibrosis associations
papers.research_gap: Longitudinal changes in LS7 and hepatic outcomes; integration with noninvasive fibrosis markers; intervention trials
papers.key_assessment: Life's Simple 7 (smoking, BMI, BP, cholesterol, fasting glucose, physical activity, diet)

papers.title: Revolutionizing hepatic fibrosis staging: A machine learning approach combining clinical, biochemical, and microbiome insights
papers.main_contribution: RF & XGBoost models with microbiome achieve 99.1% balanced accuracy; advanced fibrosis (F3/F4) show pathogenic dysbiosis; superior to APRI, FIB-4
papers.research_gap: External validation in independent cohorts; cost feasibility; generalization to non-biopsy populations

papers.title: The interplay between exosomal miRNAs and cytokine networks in metabolic diseases
papers.journal: Frontiers in Cell and Developmental Biology
papers.main_contribution: miR-122, miR-155, miR-34a regulate lipid metabolism & inflammation; exosome engineering shows therapeutic promise; dual role as biomarkers & therapeutics
papers.research_gap: Clinical translation of exosome-based therapies; standardized measurement protocols; cost-effectiveness in diagnostics

papers.title: Serum Inflammatory Markers and Dietary Inflammatory Index in Obese Individuals With Fatty Liver Disease: A Case-Control Study
papers.main_contribution: CRP significantly elevated in NAFLD (12.2 vs 8.5 mg/L); CRP independently associated (OR 2.89); DII showed no significant association
papers.research_gap: Mechanistic studies on inflammation-NAFLD link; targeted anti-inflammatory interventions; broader dietary assessment tools

papers.title: Serum biomarker screening and metabolic profiling analysis of nonalcoholic fatty liver disease patients using untargeted metabolomics and machine learning techniques
papers.main_contribution: 942 differential metabolites identified; maresin 1, canavaninosuccinate, paraxanthine, 1-methyluric acid as diagnostic biomarkers; cholesterol & caffeine metabolism dysregulated
papers.research_gap: Validation in independent cohorts; mechanistic pathway studies; translation to clinical biomarker panels

papers.title: Metabolomic characteristics and mechanisms of subgingival plaque in MASLD patients with periodontitis
papers.main_contribution: 2126 differential metabolites in subgingival plaque; 5 core metabolites identified via LASSO; immune-metabolic dysregulation in comorbidity
papers.research_gap: Mechanistic validation; clinical trial of periodontal interventions in MASLD; therapeutic target studies

papers.title: Integrated metabolomics and machine learning identify potential biomarkers and metabolism-related targets for MASLD in older adults
papers.main_contribution: 6 optimal biomarkers in aged MASLD: PC 18:1_22:6, 2'-deoxyuridine-5-monophosphate, porphobilinogen, uridine, all-trans-13,14-dihydroretinol, D-ribulose 1,5-bisphosphate; phosphatidylcholine dysregulation
papers.research_gap: Validation in larger elderly cohorts; mechanistic studies on phosphatidylcholine synthesis (PCYT1A, PEMT); age-stratified cutoffs

papers.title: Impact of glucose metabolism abnormalities on live birth rate in South-East Asian women with polycystic ovary syndrome
papers.main_contribution: Abnormal glucose metabolism in PCOS doesn't reduce LBR (52.7% vs 48.2%) but increases GDM (15.2% vs 28.0%) & HTN (2.3% vs 9.0%) complications
papers.research_gap: Optimal glucose screening algorithms in PCOS; therapeutic approaches to prevent obstetric complications; ethnicity-specific outcomes

key_themes: Novel biomarkers (exosomal proteins, microRNAs, metabolomic signatures, adipokines)
Noninvasive imaging integration (ultrasound, transient elastography, MRI)
Machine learning and AI-driven risk stratification
Herbal and dietary interventions with metabolomics confirmation
Health equity and disparities in screening and treatment
Shared pathophysiological pathways (insulin resistance, inflammation, oxidative stress)
